overall.description: A nighttime drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon-lit highways, tunnels with red ambient lighting, and dense urban canyons with massive holographic billboards. The vehicle navigates under overpasses, through tunnels, and stops at traffic lights in a high-tech metropolitan environment.

vehicle ahead slows down approaching the crosswalk area

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a covered highway underpass with concrete infrastructure overhead. Digital advertisements glow on the left wall while a red concrete barrier lines the right. The scene transitions to an open intersection with a crosswalk as the vehicle ahead slows.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates through an urban highway interchange, turning right onto an elevated ramp. Large digital billboards line the right side while concrete infrastructure dominates the left. The scene approaches a tunnel entrance glowing with red interior lighting.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow tunnel illuminated by striking red neon strips along the walls. The enclosed concrete space creates an intimate atmosphere before emerging back into the open city with cooler neon tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk city center with mega billboards

events.description: emerging from tunnel into main city canyon with towering skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into the heart of the cyberpunk city, surrounded by massive mega-billboards and towering glass skyscrapers. Neon lights in cyan and magenta illuminate the scene as the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic toward a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with traffic control and commercial buildings

traffic light changes to green, proceeding through intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light waiting for signal to change

entered.detail: multi-directional traffic signal assembly showing red light
building facade with prominent 'Ferguson' signage and multiple digital screens

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a major intersection dominated by the Ferguson commercial building and stops at a red traffic light. Other vehicles wait ahead. After the light changes to green, the vehicle proceeds through the crosswalk and continues into the neon-lit city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transitions from the oppressive concrete of highway underpasses into the vibrant, towering heart of a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins beneath a covered underpass flanked by glowing digital advertisements and red concrete barriers, moving forward as the road opens into a wide intersection. The camera then follows the vehicle as it navigates an elevated highway interchange, passing massive billboards before diving into a narrow tunnel saturated with striking red neon light. As the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, the environment shifts from enclosed concrete to an expansive urban canyon dominated by cyan and magenta mega-billboards and glass skyscrapers. The journey finally culminates at a major intersection beneath the Ferguson commercial building, where the vehicle pauses at a red light before proceeding forward into the glowing city.
